title: Two-week traffic-accident insurance POC
mission: 基于上传的事故材料、保险公司 POC 需求和现有代码能力，在预算有限的条件下，制定并开始执行一个两周内可交付的保险公司 POC。
disclaimer: All people, companies, vehicles, locations, claim facts, images, and commercial requirements in this fixture are synthetic. Outputs are product-planning evidence, not a traffic-enforcement, legal, underwriting, or claims decision.

required_capabilities: ingest one insurer requirement document and at least two accident images
produce a non-authoritative liability recommendation with confidence and missing evidence
require human review before any claim-facing or external action

available: D06-D11 governed Agent runtime and Product API
filesystem Artifact Store and append-only audit ledger
Policy Gate, bounded recovery, and human Approval
missing_or_limited: no direct image payload support in the current Gateway chat contract

privacy.cloud_rule: Only sanitized, minimum-necessary context may use a cloud provider.
privacy.external_write_rule: Private accident evidence must never leave the governed runtime without explicit human approval.

known_demo_adapters.image_adapter_limitation: Only the two generated, checksum-bound synthetic PNG fixtures are supported in the stable demo. Unknown images fail explicitly and can be retried after a formal multimodal Adapter is configured.

accident-intersection.png: Vehicle B turns left across Vehicle A's straight path at a signal-controlled intersection.
The scene diagram shows a cross-path collision zone and no protected left-turn arrow evidence.
accident-damage.png: Vehicle A has front-right damage and Vehicle B has right-side damage.
Visible damage geometry is consistent with the synthetic cross-path scenario but is insufficient for an authoritative liability decision.
